title: Plan Next Milestone
purpose: Transition from completed milestone to next milestone by updating canonical state, tickets, and execution context.
prerequisites: All current milestone tickets are completed
Worktree is clean or changes are committed

steps.description: Verify current milestone is truly complete
Read dependency graph to identify next milestone
Update canonical state to reflect new milestone
Set first ticket of new milestone to in_progress

steps: Revert canonical state to previous milestone
git stash or git checkout -- meta/state/canonical-state.json

validation: Canonical state shows new milestone as in_progress
First ticket of new milestone shows in_progress
